name: Update your DNS Records
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your DNS (domain name server) must be hosted by a third party, external to Neto. Once "}, {"text": "you have requested that your site go live"}, {"text": " we will send you the IP address to change the A and WWW records in your DNS. Neto provides basic support only with this, they are unable to make the changes to a third party system on your behalf."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You do not need to notify Neto if you transfer the domain name between third party servers."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": The instructions below all require information provided to you by the Neto launch specialists.
